# Tailwind to Biga Token Mappings

Simple table to reference as we migrate from TW color classes to tokens.
Most tokens will be found in the first table, but for dag and viz colors, see the second table.
If the TW class does not exist in this table, we probably should not have been using it in the first place OR our design system is missing a token for that color.
In that case, please raise an issue in [#tmp-dev-design-tokens](https://dbt-labs.slack.com/archives/C07TSDLFPM3).

See [TW -> Token Migration](https://www.notion.so/dbtlabs/Tailwind-Token-Migration-12dbb38ebda780e88829d0a3b0ab9fe5?d=12ebb38ebda78012b69f001ce6209e9a#12dbb38ebda780e4b009f828d2048148) for a more information.

| Tailwind Color       | Biga Token                      | Notes                                                    |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |

| \*-blue-200          | bgBadgeSkyBlueMuted             |                                                          |

## dag & viz Tokens

Our dag and viz tokens require special handling since they utilize more colors than just the basic palette.
See our figma docs for more examples:

- [dag/lineage](<https://www.figma.com/design/osn6heqyx0nPtG7s6ti6bE/Pumpernickel-(dbt-cloud-ui)?m=auto&node-id=31372-2218&t=qUgtHCkSzqn9LeFp-1>)
- [viz](<https://www.figma.com/design/osn6heqyx0nPtG7s6ti6bE/Pumpernickel-(dbt-cloud-ui)?m=auto&node-id=31399-5773&t=qUgtHCkSzqn9LeFp-1>)
